Package com.rays.dto

Class UserDTO

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDTO
      • com.rays.dto.UserDTO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DropdownList
    @Entity
public class UserDTO
extends BaseDTO
    Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a User entity in the ORS application.

    Maps to the ST_USER database table and holds user-related information such as personal details, login credentials, role assignment, account status, and profile picture reference.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description

      The alternate contact phone number of the user.

      The date of birth of the user.

      The gender of the user.

      The ID of the profile picture attachment associated with this user.

      The timestamp of the user's last successful login.

      The last name of the user.

      The login ID (typically email) of the user.

      The password of the user.

      The ID of the role assigned to the user.
      private java.lang.String roleName
      The name of the role assigned to the user.
      private java.lang.String status
      The account status of the user (e.g., "Active", "Inactive").
      private java.lang.Integer unsucessfullLoginAttempt
      The count of consecutive unsuccessful login attempts.

        The ID of the role assigned to the user.

        The timestamp of the user's last successful login.

      • unsucessfullLoginAttempt

        private java.lang.Integer unsucessfullLoginAttempt
        The count of consecutive unsuccessful login attempts. Defaults to 0.

        private java.lang.Long imageId
        The ID of the profile picture attachment associated with this user.
